SELECT a, bitNot(a) AS bitNot_a FROM bit_test;
CREATE TABLE nested_test AS SELECT a AS value FROM bit_test;
SELECT value, bitNot(value) AS bitNot_value FROM nested_test WHERE value IN (SELECT a FROM bit_test WHERE a < 5);
CREATE TABLE t1 (x UInt8, y UInt8);
SELECT x, bitNot(x) AS bitNot_x, bitNot(y) AS bitNot_y FROM t1 WHERE bitNot(x) > 0;
WITH (SELECT bitNot(a) FROM bit_test WHERE a IS NOT NULL) AS negated_values SELECT * FROM negated_values;
SELECT a, (bitNot(a) + bitNot(a)) AS double_negation FROM bit_test;
CREATE TABLE combined_test AS SELECT x, y FROM t1 WHERE x + y > 20;
SELECT x, bitNot(x) AS neg_x FROM combined_test WHERE x IN (SELECT x FROM t1) ORDER BY neg_x DESC;
